headline: Unreal Engine 5
description: Unreal Engine 5 (UE5, Epic Games, 2022) is a AAA game engine featuring Nanite (virtualized micropolygon geometry — billions of polygons without LODs), Lumen (fully dynamic global illumination), World Partition (automatic world streaming), and MetaHuman (realistic human characters). Free for indies (5% royalty after $1M revenue).
